preamble.summary: Oracle against Babylon (part 1). MT ch. 50 = LXX ch. 27. In LXX, the Babylon oracle is the 3rd OAN; in MT it is the last and longest. LXX is significantly shorter.
preamble.notable_variants: LXX is approximately 15-20% shorter. Many of the expansive judgment descriptions and repeated phrases in MT are absent or condensed in LXX. The core message is the same: Babylon will fall, Israel will return.
preamble.structural_notes: MT chs. 50-51 = LXX chs. 27-28. Babylon oracle is 3rd in LXX OAN order (after Elam and Egypt) but 9th (last) in MT.
